body: The SMTP relay on the hosting server stopped relaying after the June 1st maintenance window.
I have restored the SMTP credentials. Please test by submitting the contact form again.
The donate button returns a 500 error. Several members have reported this since last week.
Identified a misconfigured payment gateway API key. Working on a fix now.
The /committee/minutes page keeps showing a 404 error since the last website update.
Fixed. The page URL changed during the update. Updated all internal links. Marking solved.
I tried to submit a prayer request but clicking Submit does absolutely nothing.
Repaired the JavaScript validation error causing the form to stall. Please try again.
The choir page shows June 2025 rehearsal dates. Can you update it to 2026?
I see the issue. The automated sync pulled the wrong year from the calendar plugin. Investigating.
The VBS registration page just spins forever on my phone. My grandson needs to sign up.
Found that a large unoptimized image was causing the mobile timeout. Compressed and redeployed.
I requested a password reset but no email arrived. I checked my spam folder too.
The password reset mailer was affected by the same SMTP issue as ticket 701. Should be resolved now.
I donated to the building fund last Tuesday and have not received any receipt.
This is related to the SMTP outage. Calvin is fixing the email system. We will resend receipts once resolved.
I tried to upload the contractor bid PDF to the building committee portal but keep getting a file-size error.
Increased the upload limit from 5 MB to 25 MB. Your file should upload successfully now.
I submitted the baby dedication form three days ago but Pastor Wilkins says he never received it.
This is also related to the contact form email outage. We received your request in the database. Pastor Wilkins will reach out shortly.
I signed up for the newsletter twice and never received a confirmation. Am I on the list?
Found the bug. The newsletter plugin was not writing to the subscriber database. Patching now.
